strengths: 15+ years of polyglot full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder experience running an event-driven platform on Kubernetes, showing architectural ownership
concerns: No prior executive (CTO/VP) role or evidence of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers
Lacks demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems in regulated, high-stakes environments
Limited fintech-infrastructure depth — no credit risk, liquidity, or trade-decisioning experience

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and low-latency backend expertise

response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned senior individual contributor with strong craftsmanship, distributed-systems exposure (Sociomantic-scale traffic), and emerging agentic-AI tooling work at re:cinq. However, the role demands an executive with a track record of scaling 30+ person organizations, governing outsourced delivery, and operating multi-agent AI in regulated fintech — none of which appear on the resume. The profile reads as a strong staff/principal engineer rather than a CTO candidate for a venture-backed fintech scale-up.
